## Summary

Briefly describe what this PR changes and why.

## Related issue

Closes #<issue-number> (or "n/a").

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Deployment / infrastructure

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the existing style in `R/` (1-space indent, `<-` assignment)
- [ ] New file reads go through `local_path()` from `R/data_source.R`
- [ ] Updated relevant docs in `docs/` if behavior changed
- [ ] `R CMD check` passes locally (CI will also run this)
- [ ] No internal paths / hostnames / credentials introduced in committed files

## Screenshots / before-after

If this changes UI or plot output, attach a before/after image.
